releaseNotes: Six fixes from the audit. Alarm delete now shows ONE dialog (was double-dialoging). Sleep tab replaced the 2×2 grid with section headers ('This week / Last week' or 'This month / Last month'). Dashboard 'Coming up' is today's calendar events only — checklist items stay in 'Today's plan'. 'Ready to focus?' now labels the number 'today' so it stops reading like a weekly total. Coach can now answer calendar-period questions ('last week', 'this month') via dedicated period-aware tools — no more 'last 7 days' confusion.
